pageSubtitle: Automate WhatsApp review requests after each sale — Zenith plan.
paywallBody: Automatic review collection via WhatsApp (POS connection, courtesy window, GDPR) is available exclusively on the Zenith plan.
section1Intro: Set the ideal delay before a message is sent to your customers after their visit.
businessTypeHint: Recorded business type when you save:
ecommerceStrategyIntro: REPUTEXA watches the tracking number. The countdown only starts when the parcel is officially delivered (carrier scan).
ecommerceStrategyImmediate: Immediate gratification (fashion, gadgets) — send 2h after “Delivered” scan
ecommerceStrategyTestMount: Assembly & testing (furniture, electronics) — send 24h after “Delivered” scan
ecommerceStrategyCustom: Custom — choose the delay after the “Delivered” scan
ecommerceUxAfterDelivery: After-delivery reviews: the webhook must send status (e.g. Delivered) and whatsapp_consent: true once the parcel is delivered.
ecommerceUxSend2h: REPUTEXA sends the WhatsApp 2h after the “Delivered” scan (carrier).
ecommerceUxSend24h: REPUTEXA sends the WhatsApp 24h after the “Delivered” scan (carrier).
ecommerceUxSendCustom: REPUTEXA sends the WhatsApp {delay} after the “Delivered” scan (carrier).
ecommerceUxShippedOnly: If status is shipped only, nothing is scheduled until it is delivered.
ecommerceUxRich: <lead>After-delivery reviews</lead>: the webhook must send <mono>status</mono> (e.g. Delivered) and <mono>whatsapp_consent: true</mono> once the parcel is delivered.
ecommerceUxPhysical: The system automatically picks a suitable moment <delay /> with light random variation so it feels natural.
toastTokenOk: Legacy token regenerated. Update your POS if you still use this method.
toastApiKeyOk: New key generated. Update your POS configuration immediately.
